# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Pipeline
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        
      - name: Build
        run: |
          # Replace with your commands to build the application
          echo "Building application..."
          
      - name: Test
        run: |
          # Replace with your commands for testing the application
          echo "Testing application..."
      
      - name: Deploy
        uses: alex-page/circleci-ssh@v2.1.4
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.USERNAME }}
          key: ${{ secrets.SSH_KEY }}
          # Replace "project_path" and "command" with your actual project path and command to deploy the application in production.
          script: |
            cd project_path
            git pull origin main
            command
